plugins.name: agent-patterns
plugins.description: Skills for designing and evaluating multi-agent systems: orchestrator/worker decomposition, output quality review, and self-improving evaluator/optimizer loops.

plugins.name: context-sync
plugins.description: Keeps CLAUDE.md files in sync with the actual codebase by detecting meaningful changes and proposing targeted updates.

plugins.name: eval-framework
plugins.description: Evaluation framework skills for designing scoring rubrics, running structured evaluations on LLM outputs, and comparing candidate outputs to recommend a winner.

plugins.name: game-design
plugins.description: Game design skills for 3D action-RPGs: core loop design, system architecture, balance tuning, and progression design. Bridges design intent to Godot 4.x implementation.

plugins.name: gdscript-guide
plugins.description: GDScript 2.0 idioms, static typing best practices, performance patterns, and style guidance for Godot 4.x. Reference when writing or reviewing GDScript code.

plugins.name: godot-code-quality
plugins.description: Unified quality gate for Godot 4.x projects: runs gdlint, gdformat, GdUnit4 tests, and C# Roslyn checks as a single pass/fail gate with per-check breakdown.

plugins.name: godot-patterns
plugins.description: Architectural patterns for Godot 4.x: scene composition, node hierarchies, signal-based decoupling, Autoloads, and Resource design. Reference when designing new scenes or refactoring existing ones.

plugins.name: memory-manager
plugins.description: Skills for persistent memory across Claude Code sessions: initialize a memory file, recall relevant context for the current task, and persist session learnings.

plugins.name: observability
plugins.description: Observability skills for designing logging and tracing strategies, instrumenting existing code with structured log points, and analyzing trace logs to diagnose production issues.

plugins.name: plan-manager
plugins.description: Structured plan lifecycle management with automatic tracking, gate validation, and archival of implementation plans.

plugins.name: planning
plugins.description: Produces phased implementation plans with explicit gates and validating tests at each checkpoint.

plugins.name: test-quality
plugins.description: Test development and improvement system that tracks quality patterns and progressively improves the test suite.

plugins.name: workspace-clean
plugins.description: Automated workspace hygiene checks that detect build artifacts, stale temp files, orphaned docs, and project-level clutter.
